# Sunrise PG — Gurgaon's Best Paying Guest Accommodation

> Sunrise PG provides premium boys and girls paying guest (PG) accommodation in Gurgaon (Gurugram), Haryana, India. We operate multiple locations across Sector 12, 13, 14, 15, and 40.

## Boys PG — Sector 12, 13, 14 Gurgaon

Address: H No 517/3, Prem Nagar Part 2, Sector 12/13, Near Bus Stand, Opposite Hotel Skylark, Gurgaon 122001
Google Maps: https://maps.google.com/maps?q=28.4674117,77.0365517
WhatsApp: +91 99887 12571
Website: https://sunrisepg.in

### Pricing (per month, all-inclusive):
- Single Sharing: ₹14,000 - ₹15,000
- Double Sharing: ₹8,000 - ₹9,000
- Triple Sharing: ₹6,500 - ₹7,500

### Amenities:
AC rooms, 3 home-cooked meals/day, high-speed WiFi, attached washroom with geyser, daily housekeeping, washing machine, CCTV surveillance, 24/7 power backup (inverter), parking (bike & car), RO purified water, furnished rooms.

## Girls PG — Sector 14 Gurgaon

### Pricing (per month, all-inclusive):
- Single Sharing: ₹12,500 - ₹14,000
- Double Sharing: ₹7,000 - ₹7,500
- Triple Sharing: ₹6,000 - ₹6,500

## Girls PG — Sector 15 Gurgaon

### Pricing (per month, all-inclusive):
- Single Sharing: ₹17,000
- Double Sharing: ₹10,000
- Triple Sharing: ₹7,500
- Four Sharing: ₹6,500

## Girls PG — Sector 40 Gurgaon

Address: 989, Sector 40, Gurgaon 122001
Google Maps: https://maps.google.com/maps?q=28.4465488,77.0577854

### Pricing (per month, all-inclusive):
- Single Sharing: ₹22,000
- Double Sharing: ₹10,500 - ₹12,000
- Triple Sharing: ₹8,500
- Four Sharing: ₹7,500

### Girls PG Amenities (all locations):
AC rooms, food (breakfast/lunch/dinner), WiFi, attached washroom, geyser, separate wardrobe, study table, washing machine, CCTV security, 24/7 security guard, power backup, RO water.

## Key Facts
- Zero brokerage — deal directly with owner
- Refundable security deposit only
- Minimum 1 month stay, 15 days notice to vacate
- Walk-ins and visits welcome
- Ideal for working professionals and students
- Well-connected to Rajiv Chowk, IFFCO Chowk, Huda City Centre
- Google rating: 4.8/5

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +91 99887 12571 (preferred)
- Phone: +91 99887 12571
- Website: https://sunrisepg.in
